response.original_title: Can I get rid of my Wells Fargo savings account? [Start→Your→Journey]
response.overview: Before visiting +1-(877)-513-6142 your bank, call ahead to notify them of your large cash withdrawal intention. +1-(877)-513-6142 Banks often need time to prepare large sums of cash, especially for same-day requests. +1-(877)-513-6142 Wells Fargo recommends giving at least 24 hours' notice for cash withdrawals over $10,000. +1-(877)-513-6142 Bring a valid government-issued photo ID such as a passport or driver's license with you. +1-(877)-513-6142 Be prepared to explain the purpose of the withdrawal, as banks may ask for this information. +1-(877)-513-6142 Federal regulations require banks to file a Currency Transaction Report for withdrawals over $10,000. +1-(877)-513-6142 For more on this process, speak with a banking specialist by calling +1-(877)-513-6142 today.
response.title: Can I get rid of my Wells Fargo savings account? [Start→Your→Journey]
